hotspot.profile_basis: RCH Criterion profile from bead frankenjax-lsjey showed PE/DCE clone pressure on 1000-equation Jaxprs after prior DCE loop micro-levers were exhausted.
hotspot.root_cause: Jaxpr::clone deep-cloned every Equation even in all-known PE and all-used DCE paths where the equation list is semantically reused unchanged.

baseline.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-lsjey-baseline cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'partial_eval/all_known/1000eq|dce/all_used/1000eq' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 5 --warm-up-time 2 --noplot

after.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-lsjey-candidate2 cargo bench -p fj-interpreters --bench pe_baseline -- 'partial_eval/all_known/1000eq|dce/all_used/1000eq' --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 5 --warm-up-time 2 --noplot

score.keep_gate: kept; Score >= 2.0 and same-worker rebench improved both target rows

lever: Replace Jaxpr equation Vec storage with Arc-backed copy-on-write EquationList so unchanged PE/DCE paths clone equation storage shallowly while mutable callers retain Vec-like value semantics.

alien_primitive.source: alien-graveyard persistent/immutable structural sharing and arena-style bulk lifetime primitive
alien_primitive.applied_shape: Arc<Vec<Equation>> with copy-on-write mutation and plain serde representation

isomorphism.ordering_preserved: EquationList dereferences and iterates as the original equation slice. PE all-known/all-unknown paths reuse the original equation sequence. DCE selective retention still filters original equations in original forward order.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: N/A; no comparator, priority, or tie-breaking logic changed.
isomorphism.floating_point: Identical/N/A; this changes IR storage and PE/DCE metadata reuse only, not primitive evaluation, arithmetic order, dtype promotion, or rounding.
isomorphism.rng: N/A; no random state or seed path changed.
isomorphism.serialization: EquationList serializes/deserializes as the same JSON equation array; the new fj-core test verifies no wrapper name appears in serialized Jaxpr JSON.
isomorphism.cache_fingerprint: Canonical fingerprint iteration still walks equations in the same order and ignores storage identity; the new fj-core test verifies clone mutation isolation and fingerprint behavior.
isomorphism.error_surface: PE/DCE mask validation, Jaxpr validation, and staging oracle error paths are unchanged.

golden_outputs.verified_by: RCH cargo test -p fj-interpreters --lib partial_eval -- --nocapture, test_dce_all_used_large_chain_golden_hash

verification.format: cargo fmt --check -p fj-core -p fj-interpreters -p fj-egraph: pass
verification.clippy: RCH cargo clippy -p fj-core -p fj-interpreters -p fj-egraph --all-targets -- -D warnings: pass
verification.fj_core_jaxpr_tests: RCH cargo test -p fj-core --lib jaxpr -- --nocapture: 17 passed, 0 failed
verification.fj_interpreters_partial_eval_tests: RCH cargo test -p fj-interpreters --lib partial_eval -- --nocapture: 70 passed, 0 failed
verification.pe_staging_oracle: RCH cargo test -p fj-conformance --test pe_staging_oracle -- --nocapture: 20 passed, 0 failed
verification.ubs: ubs on touched Rust files exited 1 on pre-existing inventories; no unsafe blocks, fmt clean, clippy clean, build clean, tests build clean, and the touched DCE collect::<Vec<_>>() warning was removed before final proof.

next_profile_hint: Re-profile after landing; likely residual targets are selective DCE retained-equation cloning, egraph segment cloning, or a cross-phase SSA def-use index if clone pressure shifts there.
